title: nmstate bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[2.2.54-1]
- Upgrade to 2.2.54.
- Support matching interface via PCI address. RHEL-121112
- Fix OVSDB query failure on database bigger than 20KiB. RHEL-121993

[2.2.52-1]
- Upgrade to 2.2.52
- Support interface alternative names. RHEL-110779
- Support IPv4 forwarding. RHEL-110788
- Support IPSec leftsendcert option. RHEL-110635
full_text:
[2.2.54-1]
- Upgrade to 2.2.54.
- Support matching interface via PCI address. RHEL-121112
- Fix OVSDB query failure on database bigger than 20KiB. RHEL-121993

[2.2.52-1]
- Upgrade to 2.2.52
- Support interface alternative names. RHEL-110779
- Support IPv4 forwarding. RHEL-110788
- Support IPSec leftsendcert option. RHEL-110635

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-19563.html
